title: Local Issue Tracker API
goal: Generate a real runnable local HTTP API project for tracking issues. The project must not be an agent manifest, agent scaffold, or agent dry-run. It must be a concrete software project with README, source code, automated tests, and SQLite persistence.
acceptance_criteria: README.md documents setup, tests, and how to start the API server.
Source files implement a local HTTP API, not only documentation or schemas.
Tests exist and can be executed by the benchmark.
The API server can be started locally.
The benchmark can create, list, fetch, update status, and close an issue with real HTTP requests.
SQLite usage is detectable in source or a SQLite database file is created during runtime.
negative_constraints: Do not generate an agent manifest.
Do not generate an agent scaffold.
Do not generate a dry-run-only agent project.
Do not treat permissions, guardrails, or manifest fields as the concrete application.
